narrative: Hopes for an end to the US-Iran war drive a dollar sell-off to 2.5-month lows — DXY steady at 98.02; gold higher +0.20%; equities +1.46%; VIX 17.4. USD/JPY holds at 156.37 as 300bp Fed-BoJ carry persists despite intervention fears and hawkish BoJ signals. NZD/CAD bilateral divergence (+1.325% spread) dominates G8 themes as Macklem warns of energy-driven hikes. Watch US Non-Farm Payrolls at 12:30 UTC for Fed policy direction.
